ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity, airflow) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor in the building */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor readings (e.g., Celsius, percentage, liters per second) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the last maintenance was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the reading */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time the reading was collected */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reading (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality of the reading (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* System that generated the reading (e.g., HVAC, lighting, security) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that triggered the alarm */,
  "alarm_time" TEXT /* Time the alarm was triggered */,
  "alarm_type" TEXT /* Type of alarm (e.g., high temperature, low airflow) */,
  "alarm_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alarm event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alarm (e.g., active, acknowledged, resolved) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alarm (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "acknowledged_by" TEXT /* User who acknowledged the alarm */,
  "acknowledged_time" TEXT /* Time the alarm was acknowledged */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the alarm */,
  "resolved_time" TEXT /* Time the alarm was resolved */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the alarm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_acknowledged_by FOREIGN KEY ("acknowledged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, facility manager, maintenance personnel) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "last_activity_time" TEXT /* Last time the user was active */,
  "created_time" TEXT /* Time the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "generated_time" TEXT /* Time the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)
